gaps.description: Process 'BISMARK_GENOMEPREPARATION' has no container directive. It cannot run portably on any WES-compliant cloud platform.
gaps.recommendation:
Add a container directive with a pinned image, e.g.:
    container 'quay.io/biocontainers/tool:1.0.0'

gaps.description: Process 'BISMARK_GENOMEPREPARATION' contains hardcoded absolute paths in its script block. These paths will not exist on cloud execution environments.
gaps.recommendation: Replace hardcoded paths with Nextflow input parameters. Reference files should be declared in the input: block and passed in via a params file or the workflow's input channel.
